headers.value: default-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://*.firebasestorage.app https://*.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://*.gstatic.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com;
